summary: Four documentation files updated. Two stale builder spec docs had RetryOverSeconds renamed to RetryOverMs and gained 4 missing ErrorHandler properties (IgnoreError, Message, StatusCode, Key). GoalFirst retry-skip behavior added to good_to_know.md. Retry testing todo updated to DONE. No XML doc gaps — ErrorHandler.cs already fully documented. No missing PLang examples — 4 test suites exist.

changes.description: Renamed RetryOverSeconds to RetryOverMs in ErrorHandler class and shared types. Added IgnoreError, Message, StatusCode, Key properties.
Renamed RetryOverSeconds to RetryOverMs in ErrorHandler type and .pr JSON example. Added 4 new properties.
Added GoalFirst Retry Behavior section — when error goal succeeds, retries are skipped.
Updated retry testing status from NOT STARTED to DONE with test suite references.
